# DGE Dialogue Patterns — 23 Patterns + 5 Presets

## Overview

Patterns determine "from what angle to probe design gaps." Conversations are generated by combining a template (theme) with a pattern (angle of attack).

## Pattern Quick Reference

### Category A: Contrast Patterns (5) + Coverage Patterns (1)
Place two situations side by side and gain insights from their differences / exhaustively probe contract gaps.

| ID | Pattern | What It Reveals |
|---|---|---|
| A1 | `before-after` Before/After Comparison | Adoption impact, remaining manual steps |
| A2 | `role-contrast` Role Comparison | Permission issues, lack of role-specific UX |
| A3 | `app-type-variation` App Type Variation | Type-specific constraints, template limitations |
| A4 | `expertise-contrast` Expertise Level Comparison | Insufficient beginner guidance, power-user optimization |
| A5 | `platform-contrast` Platform Comparison | Responsive design, touch interaction, API design |
| A6 | `protocol-design` Protocol Design | Gaps in service-to-service communication contracts |

### Category B: Exploration Patterns (9)
Set up specific situations to surface problems invisible in normal spec reviews.

| ID | Pattern | What It Reveals |
|---|---|---|
| B1 | `zero-state` Empty State Startup | Onboarding, default values, initial UX |
| B2 | `return-after-absence` Return After Absence | Summary features, context recovery |
| B3 | `escalation-chain` Escalation Chain | Error recovery, fallbacks, last-resort measures |
| B4 | `cross-persona-conflict` Cross-Persona Conflict | Exclusive control, priority rules, notifications |
| B5 | `migration-path` Migration Path | Data conversion, compatibility, rollback |
| B6 | `multi-tenant` Multi-Tenant Isolation | Data leaks, permission bypass |
| B7 | `concurrent-operation` Concurrent Operation | Optimistic locking, last-write-wins, conflicts |
| B8 | `delegation-matrix` Delegation Matrix | Optimal build-vs-buy responsibility split |
| B9 | `phase-minimization` Phase Minimization | True minimum viable set for each phase |

### Category C: Boundary Exploration Patterns (8)
Intentionally probe system limits and workflow weaknesses.

| ID | Pattern | What It Reveals |
|---|---|---|
| C1 | `scale-break` Scale Breakdown | Pagination, timeouts, memory |
| C2 | `hallucination-probe` Hallucination Probe | LLM output reliability, fabricated feature completion |
| C3 | `convergence-test` Convergence Test | DGE iteration convergence criteria, contradictory fixes |
| C4 | `drift-detection` Drift Detection | Post-implementation spec drift, documentation staleness |
| C5 | `security-adversary` Security Adversary | Input validation, authentication bypass |
| C6 | `accessibility-barrier` Accessibility Barrier | Screen readers, keyboard navigation |
| C7 | `disaster-recovery` Disaster Recovery | Backups, data integrity, failover |
| C8 | `i18n-mismatch` Internationalization Mismatch | Character encoding issues, date/currency formats, missing translations |

## Presets (Recommended Pattern Sets)

| Preset | Patterns | Use Case |
|---|---|---|
| 🆕 `new-project` | zero-state, role-contrast, escalation-chain | New projects |
| 🔧 `feature-extension` | before-after, cross-persona-conflict, expertise-contrast | Feature additions |
| 🚀 `pre-release` | scale-break, security-adversary, concurrent-operation, disaster-recovery | Pre-release checks |
| 📢 `advocacy` | before-after, app-type-variation, role-contrast | Internal proposals and adoption pitches |
| 🔍 `comprehensive` | zero-state, role-contrast, escalation-chain, cross-persona-conflict, scale-break, security-adversary, migration-path | Comprehensive DGE |
| 🔥 `hotfix` | escalation-chain, disaster-recovery, drift-detection | Incident response and retrospectives |
| 🤝 `onboarding` | zero-state, expertise-contrast, return-after-absence | New member onboarding |
| 💰 `monetization` | role-contrast, scale-break, cross-persona-conflict | Billing and business model validation |
| 🧹 `tech-debt` | drift-detection, before-after, convergence-test | Pre-refactoring assessment |

## Template to Preset Auto-Recommendation

| Template | Recommended Preset |
|---|---|
| api-design | feature-extension |
| feature-planning | new-project |
| go-nogo | advocacy |
| incident-review | hotfix |
| security-review | pre-release |

If no pattern is specified, the preset corresponding to the template is used automatically.

## Details

For detailed descriptions and track records of each pattern, see [docs/dge-v2/dge-dialogue-patterns.md](../docs/dge-v2/dge-dialogue-patterns.md).
